parameter.name: apikey
parameter.label: Rachio API Key
parameter.description: Visit the Rachio Web App account settings to create an API key.

parameter.name: pollingInterval
parameter.label: Polling/Refresh Interval
parameter.description: Seconds between fetching values from the cloud service

parameter.name: defaultRuntime
parameter.label: Default Runtime
parameter.description: Number of seconds to run a zone if no runtime is specified (=0)

parameter.name: eventHistoryLookbackHours
parameter.label: Event History Lookback
parameter.description: Hours of recent controller event history to retrieve. Set to 0 to disable event history polling.

parameter.name: hoseSummaryLookbackDays
parameter.label: Hose Timer Summary Lookback
parameter.description: Days of recent Smart Hose Timer summary data to retrieve.

parameter.name: hoseSummaryLookaheadDays
parameter.label: Hose Timer Summary Lookahead
parameter.description: Days of upcoming Smart Hose Timer summary data to retrieve.

parameter.name: callbackUrl
parameter.label: Callback URL
parameter.description: Public HTTPS URL that accepts legacy Rachio NotificationService POST requests at /rachio/webhook. Legacy callbacks are validated by externalId and controller identity.

parameter.name: callbackUsername
parameter.label: Callback Username
parameter.description: Optional legacy callback URL username. Leave empty unless the public endpoint explicitly supports URL userinfo for callbacks.

parameter.name: callbackPassword
parameter.label: Callback Password
parameter.description: Optional legacy callback URL password. Leave empty unless the public endpoint explicitly supports URL userinfo for callbacks.

parameter.name: clearAllCallbacks
parameter.label: Clear Callbacks
parameter.description: If true, existing callbacks for this binding instance are cleared during registration.

parameter.name: autoConfigureWebhooks
parameter.label: Auto Configure Webhooks
parameter.description: Register modern Rachio WebhookService callbacks for irrigation controllers. This is optional and off by default.

parameter.name: autoConfigureHoseTimerWebhooks
parameter.label: Auto Configure Hose Timer Webhooks
parameter.description: Also register modern Rachio WebhookService callbacks for Smart Hose Timer valves and programs. Requires Auto Configure Webhooks and is off by default.

parameter.name: useCloudWebhook
parameter.label: Use openHAB Cloud Webhook
parameter.description: Request the public callback URL from the openHAB core WebhookService, typically provided by the openHAB Cloud Connector.

parameter.name: publicWebhookUrl
parameter.label: Public Webhook URL
parameter.description: Public HTTPS URL for modern Rachio WebhookService callbacks. Used only when cloud webhook mode is disabled.
